rows.title: Migrate cart to Go (ADR-003)
rows.description: Rewrite acme-cart write paths in Go to address 71% cart abandonment driven by 180ms p95 add-to-cart latency. Dual-write window with Node.js read paths.

rows.title: PCI scope isolation rollout (ADR-014)
rows.description: Reduce PCI-DSS scope from 12 services to 1 service (acme-payment). Enforce tokenization boundary via Envoy filter + iptables egress rules.

rows.title: Blue/green deployment to all 12 services (ADR-015)
rows.description: Roll out Argo Rollouts blue/green to acme-catalog, acme-search, acme-notifications — the last 3 services still using rolling updates.

rows.title: GDPR data residency enforcement (ADR-016)
rows.description: Region-aware routing layer to ensure EU customer data never leaves eu-west-1. Includes consent banner removal.

rows.title: OpenTelemetry rollout to last 3 services (ADR-013)
rows.description: Instrument acme-fulfillment, acme-shipping, acme-recommendations with OTel SDK. Configure auto-instrumentation for HTTP, DB, gRPC.

rows.title: Load test at 6x peak across all 12 services
rows.description: October 2026 Black Friday rehearsal — drive 6x normal load through the full stack with synthetic traffic.

rows.title: Active-active deployment us-west-2 + eu-west-1
rows.description: Stand up full active-active capacity in both regions with health-check-based DNS failover.

rows.title: Multi-vendor payment failover (Stripe + Adyen)
rows.description: Add Adyen as second payment processor with sub-second failover from Stripe. Smart routing by transaction type and region.

rows.title: Cache stampede mitigation across catalog
rows.description: Add request coalescing and stale-while-revalidate to catalog service. Eliminates the 18% cache-miss spike pattern after hot SKU expirations.

rows.title: 24/7 on-call rotation playbook for Black Friday week
rows.description: Define the on-call schedule, escalation matrix, and comms protocol for the Nov 27 - Dec 1 peak window.

rows.title: LLM-augmented recommendation rerank
rows.description: Use a small fine-tuned LLM as the final rerank stage in acme-recommendations. Expected +12% click-through on personalization cohort.

rows.title: Personalized homepage A/B test
rows.description: Two-week A/B test of personalized vs static homepage hero. Primary metric: 7-day purchase rate.

rows.title: Customer-segment-aware pricing display
rows.description: Display loyalty-tier-aware pricing with subtle strike-through for discount tiers.

rows.title: Email content personalization
rows.description: Dynamic email body content based on last 30 days of browse + purchase behavior.

rows.title: Loyalty program launch
rows.description: Tiered loyalty program (Silver/Gold/Platinum) with points accrual, redemption, and exclusive early-access features.

rows.title: Service mesh migration to Istio Ambient Mesh
rows.description: Migrate from sidecar-based Istio to ambient mesh (ztunnel + waypoint) to cut per-pod overhead and simplify deployment.

rows.title: Multi-region active-active for catalog + checkout
rows.description: Extend active-active beyond storefront into the two highest-traffic services.

rows.title: Internal developer platform (IDP) launch
rows.description: Central IDP on Backstage with golden paths for new services, deployment automation, and cost attribution.

rows.title: Edge-deployed ML inference
rows.description: Deploy the recommendation model's first stage to Cloudflare Workers for sub-50ms personalization at edge.

rows.title: WebAssembly plugin runtime for catalog
rows.description: Enable third-party catalog enrichment via WASM plugins with sandboxed execution.

rows.title: Add Apple Pay and Google Pay to checkout
rows.description: Extend acme-checkout to support wallet-based payments. Reduces checkout step count from 4 to 2.

rows.title: Add rate-limiting per-customer-tier at gateway
rows.description: Tier-aware rate limits (Bronze 60rpm, Silver 120rpm, Gold 600rpm) at the Envoy gateway.

rows.title: Customer-facing order tracking page
rows.description: Publicly accessible order tracking with carrier-by-carrier status aggregation.

rows.title: Replace Elasticsearch with OpenSearch (cost reduction)
rows.description: Migrate acme-search to OpenSearch to avoid Elasticsearch licensing changes; identical API surface.

rows.title: Adopt OpenFeature for progressive rollout
rows.description: Standardize feature flag evaluation across all 12 services using OpenFeature SDK + a managed provider.

rows.title: Voice search for mobile app
rows.description: Add voice-to-search via on-device speech recognition (no cloud round-trip).

rows.title: Replace Redis with DragonflyDB for cost savings
rows.description: Drop-in Redis replacement with 5x throughput per node; cuts our $48k/yr Redis bill in half.

rows.title: SDK regeneration cadence for mobile apps
rows.description: Move from manual iOS/Android SDK regen (quarterly) to automated regen on every API spec change.

rows.title: Adopt GraphQL for storefront BFF
rows.description: Replace multiple REST round-trips from storefront with a single GraphQL BFF endpoint.

rows.title: Federated search across stores + catalog
rows.description: Single search endpoint that fans out to catalog + inventory + reviews indices with smart merging.

rows.title: Add audit log search UI to /audit center
rows.description: Visual query builder over audit events (filter by actor, action, target, time range) with export.

rows.title: Automated post-deploy smoke tests
rows.description: Playwright-driven smoke tests that run automatically after every production deployment.

rows.title: Bundle size budget for storefront
rows.description: Enforce 200KB initial JS bundle; CI fails if exceeded. Forces tree-shaking discipline.

rows.title: Replace Slack PagerDuty integration with native hooks
rows.description: Migrate from generic Slack/PagerDuty bots to native Forge hooks surfaced in incident view.

rows.title: Backfill Org Knowledge graph from Confluence
rows.description: One-time ingestion of Confluence pages into the Org Knowledge graph (entities, links, decisions).

rows.title: Self-service tenant onboarding wizard
rows.description: UI wizard for new tenants to walk through connector setup, RBAC, and starter seed selection.

rows.title: API contract diff surface in architecture center
rows.description: Visual diff between API contract versions with breaking-change highlights.

rows.title: Refactor: extract shared webhook handler
rows.description: Extract the 4 duplicate webhook handlers from acme-notifications, acme-search, acme-catalog, acme-fulfillment into a shared library.

rows.title: Refactor: split acme-shared-utils into 3 packages
rows.description: Break up the 31k LoC shared-utils package by domain (auth, observability, types) to reduce blast radius.

rows.title: Add continuous profiling to 5 critical services
rows.description: Pyroscope/Parca continuous profiling on payment, checkout, cart, catalog, frontend for flame graph analysis.

rows.title: Migrate legacy .NET inventory API to FastAPI
rows.description: Replace the .NET Framework 4.8 inventory API that handles less than 0.5% of traffic but blocks Python tooling.

attachments.value: Lower-than-expected ROI; deferred to Q4 2027 cleanup cycle

rows.title: Adopt Cursor-style IDE for all engineers
rows.description: Provide Cursor licenses to every developer and standardize the team's AI-assisted coding workflow.

attachments.value: Vendor concentration risk; evaluating multiple options

rows.title: Build in-house feature flag service
rows.description: Custom feature flag service instead of using LaunchDarkly to save $180k/year.

attachments.value: Build-vs-buy analysis favored LaunchDarkly for v1; revisit in 12 months

rows.title: Replace Datadog with Grafana Cloud
rows.description: Migrate observability vendor from Datadog to Grafana Cloud to reduce observability spend by ~40%.

rows.title: Tenant-aware LLM prompt caching
rows.description: Cache tenant-prefixed LLM responses at the gateway for 5-minute TTL. Cuts per-tenant LLM spend by 30%.

rows.title: Deprecate the legacy PHP storefront admin
rows.description: Sunset the /admin PHP storefront used by 3 merchandisers; migrate to the Next.js admin at /forge.

rows.title: Adopt tRPC for internal TypeScript services
rows.description: Replace REST+OpenAPI between acme-frontend and acme-api-gateway with tRPC for end-to-end type safety.

rows.title: Vendor security scorecard dashboard
rows.description: Build a dashboard in /admin showing security posture for each top-30 vendor (CVE count, MFA, SOC2 status).

rows.title: Migrate legacy SOAP carrier integrations to REST
rows.description: Replace 3 remaining SOAP integrations with FedEx, UPS, OnTrac REST APIs. Eliminates XML parsing overhead.

rows.title: Adopt Bun runtime for build tooling
rows.description: Replace Node-based build tooling with Bun for 10x faster CI cache installation.
